name: DA - Lead Capture + Scoring + Welcome Email

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Save Lead
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Select your 'Digital Artifacts Leads' Google Sheet and sheet tab. Columns should match: lead_id, name, email, phone, service, budget, message, how_heard, lead_magnet, submitted_at, source, score, tier, tags, nurture_stage, last_email_sent, status

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.lead_magnet ? 'Hey ' + $json.name + '! Here\'s your checklist' : 'Hey ' + $json.name + '! I got your message' }}
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for reaching out to Digital Artifacts! I've got your details and I'll be in touch within 24 hours.

In the meantime, here are a couple of things that might help:

- Check out some recent work: https://digitalartifacts.com.au/#portfolio

{{ $json.lead_magnet ? '- Here\'s your free 27-Point Website Checklist: https://digitalartifacts.com.au/downloads/The%2027-Point%20Website%20Checklist%20_%20Digital%20Artifacts.pdf\n\nHave a read through and see how your current site (or your wish list) stacks up. Happy to walk through it with you.' : '' }}

Chat soon,
Isaiah Wong
Digital Artifacts
https://digitalartifacts.com.au

nodes.name: Send Welcome Email
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Connect your Gmail credentials. Update the email body with your Cal.com link once you have one.

parameters.subject: =🔥 HOT LEAD: {{ $json.name }} — {{ $json.budget }} — {{ $json.service }}

nodes.name: Notify Isaiah - Hot Lead
nodes.notes: Sends alert email to Isaiah for hot leads (score >= 40)

parameters.subject: =New Lead: {{ $json.name }} ({{ $json.tier }})
